compiled_state.title: Research extraKnownMarketplaces + enabledPlugins consent behavior and write design document
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Done Definition
Research the runtime behavior of combining extraKnownMarketplaces + enabledPlugins in .claude/settings.json for triggering DSO plugin consent dialog on first Claude Code launch. Produce a design document at plugins/dso/docs/designs/dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.md.

Research approach (GitHub issue evidence per selected proposal):
1. Search anthropics/claude-code GitHub issues starting with issue #32607 and related issues
2. Search PR history, changelog, and release notes for extraKnownMarketplaces + enabledPlugins behavior
3. Document which path is confirmed: success (JSON snippet triggers consent) or failure (manual plugin install required)

The design document must include:
- ## Success Path section with exact settings.json JSON snippet OR ## Failure Path section with exact 'claude plugin install <url>' command
- Clear statement of which path was confirmed and what evidence supports it
- The word 'authoritative' declaring which path S2 and S5 should use

## TDD Requirement
Implements against the failing structural test from the preceding task (65d4-f5f1). After this task, bash tests/scripts/test-dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.sh must pass (GREEN).

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/docs/designs/dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.md (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (no lint errors introduced)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] Design document exists at correct path
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/docs/designs/dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.md
- [ ] Document contains required section (Success Path or Failure Path)
  Verify: grep -q '## Success Path\|## Failure Path' plugins/dso/docs/designs/dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.md
- [ ] Document references extraKnownMarketplaces
  Verify: grep -q 'extraKnownMarketplaces' plugins/dso/docs/designs/dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.md
- [ ] Document declares which path is authoritative
  Verify: grep -q 'authoritative' plugins/dso/docs/designs/dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.md
- [ ] Structural test passes GREEN after doc is created
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.sh
